mods.name: Supplementaries
mods.description: A large, highly configurable Vanilla+ mod adding 80+ functional and decorative blocks and items that feel at home in the base game.

mods.name: Amendments
mods.description: Small vanilla tweaks and touch-ups: directional signs, hanging pots, ceiling lanterns, carpeted stairs and more.

mods.name: Every Compat (Wood Good)
mods.description: Fills in every missing wooden block from every mod you have installed, automatically. No per-mod compat addons needed.

mods.name: Supplementaries Squared
mods.description: Supplementaries addon with extra variants: colored sacks, wooden item shelves, plaques, metal frames and more.

mods.name: Map Atlases
mods.description: A vanilla-friendly world map: bundle your maps into one atlas that fills itself in as you explore.

mods.name: Universal Sawmill
mods.description: The woodcutter as it was meant to be: works with every wood from every mod, automatically. Comes with a Carpenter villager.

mods.name: Polytone
mods.description: Resource pack driven customization for block colors, colormaps, biome and dye colors, sounds, particles and more.

mods.name: Nautilus Studio
mods.description: An in-game workbench for building data and resource packs: pick a file, fill in the form, hit reload.

mods.name: Snowy Spirit
mods.description: Sleds, garlands, gift wrapping, ginger houses and winter villager activities. Christmas, in mod form.

mods.name: Haunted Harvest
mods.description: Pumpkin carving, corn food and villagers who go trick-or-treating. Halloween that lasts all year.

mods.name: Sleep Tight
mods.description: A full sleep and bed overhaul: hammocks, night bags, bedbugs, nightmares and dream essence.

mods.name: Smarter Farmers
mods.description: Farmer villagers that replant what they harvest, handle modded crops, carry a hoe and stop trampling their own fields.

mods.name: Mystical Oak Tree
mods.description: A talking, NPC-like tree with 300+ lines of lore, wisdom and questionable facts.

mods.name: Storage Labels
mods.description: Fancy item labels for your chests and barrels, so you can find things at a glance.

mods.name: Goated
mods.description: Goats worth keeping: block-breaking ram blocks, thatch, a viking helmet and geeps.

mods.name: A Good Place
mods.description: Blocks pop, slide and swing into place instead of just appearing. Fully customizable with resource packs.

mods.name: Vista
mods.description: Televisions, cassettes and viewfinders: collect GIF tapes and wire up live camera feeds in your base.

mods.name: Heartstone
mods.description: Paired stones that let you and a friend track each other across the world, no F3 required.

mods.name: Fast Paintings
mods.description: Rewrites painting rendering to be faster, and lets paintings have custom models.

mods.name: MmmMmmMmmMmm
mods.description: A target dummy that shows the damage you deal and can be dressed up in armor.

mods.name: JEED
mods.description: Just Enough Effect Descriptions: a JEI tab explaining exactly what every status effect does.

mods.name: JEPP
mods.description: Just Enough Painting Previews: a JEI/REI tab that previews every painting, with name, size and source mod.

mods.name: Advancement Frames
mods.description: Turns your advancements into nice looking plaques you can display.

mods.name: Randomium
mods.description: An ore that behaves randomly and can drop absolutely any item in the game.

mods.name: Moyai
mods.description: Adds naturally spawning Moyai to your game. 🗿
